product.name: Extra Thick Exercise Yoga Mat with Strap - 2/5 Inch (10MM), Non-Slip Workout Mat for Yoga, Pilates, and Floor Exercises
product.description: Feetlu Body Alignment Yoga mat is designed to be suitable for multi-purpose yoga exercise. Most notably, the ultra-gripping property of the mat allows its surface to be slip-free throughout all yoga practices. The Incomparable comfort elevate cushioning and protection for your joints and knees to the next level from minor to major exercise sessions and is higher recommended by yoga user.
features: [ITS-Certified & Durable] Built to last, this tear-resistant yoga mat is ITS-certified and odorless—perfect for yoga, Pilates, and floor workouts of all kinds.
[Extra Thick & Joint-Friendly] With a spacious 72" x 24" surface and 10mm thickness, this mat provides superior cushioning to protect knees and joints during every session.
[Non-Slip & Stable Design] Dual-textured surfaces offer excellent grip and traction, keeping you steady through every pose, stretch, or strength move.
[Lightweight & Travel-Friendly] Weighing just 1.3kg and including a handy carrying strap, this mat is easy to take to the gym, office, or outdoor workouts.
[Easy Care & Warranty] Spot clean with cold water and mild detergent. Dry flat and store away from sunlight. Enjoy peace of mind with Feetlu’s product assurance.
Thickness +/- 0.5 mm, width +/- 1 cm, length +/- 2 cm
